modes.intent: Finger-first layout for phones, tablets, kiosks, and any coarse-pointer context where precision is low and targets must be generous.

responsive_transformations: Touch is the floor for coarse pointers and is never downgraded below a 44px target, even on a large tablet.
Above 1024px with a confirmed fine-pointer, the app may offer comfortable as an optional denser mode but defaults to touch on first load.
Primary actions move to a thumb-reachable bottom zone on tall phone viewports.
Adjacent targets keep at least 8px of separation so neighbouring controls are not mis-tapped.
notes: hit_area_min_px of 44 satisfies the WCAG / platform touch-target minimum; this is a hard floor, not a target to shrink under.
Hover-only affordances are forbidden here — every action must be reachable by tap, with focus and active states for keyboard users.
Generous spacing also leaves room for the on-screen keyboard and avoids accidental activation while scrolling.
Pair with reduced or balanced motion; heavy decorative motion drains battery on mobile.
